name: 【システム】03_21-システム-自動バックアップ_V5

parameters.query: SELECT table_name, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(quote_ident(table_name))) as size, (SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = t.table_name) as columns FROM information_schema.tables t WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE' ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(quote_ident(table_name)) DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) as products_count FROM products_master
SELECT COUNT(*) as orders_count FROM orders_unified

INSERT INTO performance_snapshots (snapshot_date, sales_data, inventory_data, tasks_data, listings_data) VALUES (CURRENT_DATE, $1::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (snapshot_date) DO UPDATE SET sales_data = EXCLUDED.sales_data, updated_at = NOW()

parameters.name: body
